title: GlaxoSmithKline India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: GlaxoSmithKline India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
GlaxoSmithKline India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About GlaxoSmithKline India:
GlaxoSmithKline India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India!
